project_area: Refugee and immigrant services, including food delivery, housing support, healthcare enrollment, and COVID-19 response
demographic_requirements: Refugees, immigrants, elders, and individuals with underlying health conditions
eligibility_summary: Services are provided to refugees and immigrants in Maine, with a focus on vulnerable populations such as elders and those with health conditions. Specific programs include Refugee Cash and Medical Assistance, Refugee Medical Screening, Youth Mentoring, Employment Services, Case Management, and Health Promotion Grants.
